title: e-Invoices
draft_hint: DRAFT — not yet sent to LHDN
draft_hint_desc: Click 'Submit to MyInvois' to obtain a UIN. The mock adapter responds synchronously.
final_hint_desc: This invoice is now a legal tax document. Modifications must go through a Credit Note.
reject_modal_desc: Reject on behalf of the buyer. Allowed only inside the 72h opposition window (72s in DEMO_MODE). Reason will be sent to LHDN (minimum 3 characters).
search_placeholder: Search by invoice number or UIN

consolidated.description: Roll up every B2C customer's shipped Sales Orders for the chosen month into one Draft Consolidated Invoice each. SOs already individually invoiced or already rolled-up are skipped automatically.

messages.submitted: Invoice submitted to MyInvois. UIN issued.
messages.rejectReasonMin: Rejection reason must be at least 3 characters.
messages.finalizeScanComplete: Finalize scan complete: {{count}} invoice(s) advanced to FINAL (window = {{seconds}}s).
messages.consolidatedNoneFound: No eligible B2C sales orders found for {{month}}.
messages.consolidatedGenerated: Generated {{count}} Consolidated Invoice(s) covering {{customers}} customer(s) for {{month}}.

countdown.elapsedHint: Opposition window has elapsed — click Run Finalize Scan or refresh to advance to FINAL.

precheck.aiUnavailable: AI check unavailable — only hard rules applied
precheck.aiUnavailableReason: Reason: {{reason}}. The 3 soft semantic checks were skipped.
precheck.aiUnavailableDefault: The 3 soft semantic checks were skipped.
precheck.acknowledge: I acknowledge the risks above and want to force-submit anyway.

banner.passDesc: All checks passed. Click Submit to send this invoice to MyInvois.
banner.warnDesc: Some soft checks raised warnings. You can still submit, but consider fixing the flagged items first.
banner.failDesc: One or more hard rules failed. Submitting now is likely to be rejected by LHDN. Acknowledge the risk to force-submit.

items.MSIC_CODE_PRESENT: MSIC code on header + every line

creditNote.notCreditable: Invoice status is {{status}} — only VALIDATED or FINAL invoices can be credited.
creditNote.draftHintDesc: Click 'Submit to MyInvois' to obtain a UIN. Cancelling at this point will roll back stock automatically.

placeholders.reasonDescription: Optional — specifics of why this CN is being raised

messages.atLeastOneLine: Enter a return quantity on at least one line.
messages.submitted: Credit Note submitted to MyInvois. UIN issued.
messages.cancelled: Credit Note cancelled. Stock has been rolled back.

errors.INVOICE_INVALID_STATUS: Invoice is not in a valid status for this action.
errors.INVOICE_REJECTION_WINDOW_EXPIRED: The 72h opposition window has expired; this invoice can no longer be rejected.
errors.SO_NOT_INVOICEABLE: Sales order must be PARTIAL_SHIPPED or FULLY_SHIPPED to generate an invoice.
errors.SO_NOTHING_SHIPPED: Sales order has no shipped quantities to invoice.
